MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Judondi Bolden, Esq. 510/986-0455 for pltf & opposing party; Theodore Janowsky, Esq. 865-9211 for deft & moving party.
RULING: The Court takes the matter off calendar per parties, settled.

Notice Of Petition For Relief From Forfeiture Of A Lease;Petition;Mp&As;Def'S Verification;Decl. Of Stephanie Prior;Ehhibit In Support
Off Calendar Jan-29-2002 Continued To Feb-05-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Judondi Bolden, Esq. 510/986-0455 for pltf & opposing party; Ted Janowsky, Esq. 575-3130 for deft & moving party.
RULING: The Court continues the matter to 02/05/02 for pltf to file opposition & stays eviction until 02/06. Opposition due 02/01; reply if any due 02/04 9am; service by hand or fax; pltf to submit confirming letter with courtesy copies; deft to bring appropriate papers for stay today.
